headline: UBS and BofA Lift Price Targets on Viatris (VTRS)
summary: Viatris Inc. (NASDAQ:VTRS) is one of the 10 Best Stocks Under $20 to Buy According to Hedge Funds. On February 27, UBS raised its price target on Viatris Inc. (NASDAQ:VTRS) from $18 to $20 and maintained a Buy rating. UBS said the company achieved expected cost-saving targets and the company’s fiscal year 2026 guidance came […]

headline: Inside One Fund's $170 Million Bet on a Biotech Stock Up 1,040% in a Year Amid FDA Review for Breast Cancer Drug
summary: Celcuity develops targeted cancer therapies and diagnostics, leveraging proprietary technology to advance precision oncology solutions.
